title: 'Ali Marries Fatimah
description: According to Abu Ja'far (al-Tabari): In this year, a few days before the end of Safar (which ended September 1, 623), 'Ali b. Abi Talib married Fatimah °' I have been told this on the authority of Muhammad b. 'Amr-Abu Bakr b. 'Abd Allah b. Abi SabrahIshaq b. `Abd Allah b. Abi Farwah-Abu ja'far.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 07
